rules.rule: Atlas Enterprise Entity Specifications canonical source root is knowledge/entity/. docs/knowledge/entity duplicates are Legacy Superseded unless verifiable generation and mirror metadata exist.
New or upgraded Entity Enterprise Specifications must be created at knowledge/entity/{{EntityName}}.md and not as second canonical docs/knowledge/entity specifications.
docs/knowledge/entity is not an automated generated directory unless a formal build, publish, copy, or synchronization pipeline is established.
